LESSON PLAN
Subject: Auto Mechanics | Class: VOCATIONAL_ADVANCED | Board: NABTEB

Objective: By the end of this lesson, students will be able to create the key concepts in Auto Mechanics as specified by the NABTEB curriculum.

Activity: Students work in groups of four. Each group receives a scenario card based on a familiar Nigerian context. They must create the relevant concept and present their findings to the class. Names used: Chidi, Fatima, Ngozi, Aminu, Taiwo, Adaeze.

Assessment: Exit quiz of five questions. Students scoring below 40% receive guided practice. Marks allocated per NABTEB continuous assessment guidelines.
reference:
Lesson Plan: Auto Mechanics | NABTEB | VOCATIONAL_ADVANCED
Objective: Students will design key concepts in Auto Mechanics.
Activity: Guided class exercise with Nigerian context examples.
Assessment: Short quiz to check understanding.
